data.content:
# Implementation Plan — Retire foolery setup wizard

## Files to delete (repo)
- scripts/setup.sh (1516 LOC)
- scripts/agent-wizard.sh (676 LOC)
- scripts/dispatch-pools.sh (241 LOC)
- scripts/model-picker.sh (275 LOC)
- scripts/toml-reader.sh (300 LOC)
- scripts/test-setup-scan-unmounted.sh (wizard-only)
- scripts/test-install-copilot-setup.sh (wizard-only PTY smoke test)
- scripts/test-model-picker.sh (wizard-only)
- scripts/test-model-picker-integration.sh (wizard-only)
- src/lib/__tests__/setup-settings-writer.test.ts (sources setup.sh/agent-wizard.sh)
- src/lib/__tests__/setup-model-discovery.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/setup-interactive.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/setup-additive.test.ts
- src/lib/__tests__/model-picker-filter.test.ts
Keep scripts/test-copilot-settings-ui.{sh,mjs} — they exercise the UI fallback.

## package.json
- Delete test:smoke:copilot:install.
- Keep test:smoke:copilot:ui.

## scripts/install.sh
- Remove top-level SETUP_URL var (line 15).
- Remove launcher-template SETUP_URL (line 218) and the env-wiring on line 781.
- Rewrite setup_cmd:
  1. Resolve $APP_DIR/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md; fail loudly if missing.
  2. Detect first CLI in order: claude, codex, opencode, gemini, copilot; honor FOOLERY_SETUP_AGENT.
  3. Invoke per CLI:
     - claude: exec claude < "$skill"
     - codex: exec codex exec "$(cat "$skill")"
     - opencode: exec opencode run "$(cat "$skill")"
     - gemini: exec gemini -p "$(cat "$skill")"
     - copilot: exec copilot -p "$(cat "$skill")"
  4. If no CLI / override missing, fail loudly with expected list + UI fallback.

## scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh
- After bundling the config CLI, copy .claude/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md into $RUNTIME_DIR/skills/foolery-configure/SKILL.md.

## Docs
- scripts/README.md: remove dead bullets; point at foolery-configure skill.
- README.md lines 86-96: reflect new flow (hands skill to agent CLI; UI fallback).
- docs/audit/beats-usage-inventory.md: note wizard retirement; historical mentions OK.

## Tests
- Update src/lib/__tests__/install-launcher-path.test.ts: drop the FOOLERY_SETUP_URL expectation; add tests that stub claude/codex on PATH and assert the generated launcher invokes them with SKILL.md content; add a no-CLI test asserting loud failure.

## Verification
- bash -n scripts/install.sh
- bun run lint && bunx tsc --noEmit && bun run test && bun run build
- bash scripts/build-runtime-artifact.sh; tar -tzf dist/foolery-runtime-*.tar.gz | grep foolery-configure
- grep -rn "setup.sh|agent-wizard|dispatch-pools|model-picker|toml-reader" (no live refs)
